headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Estee Lauder Cos, Raises Price Target to $75
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Estee Lauder Cos (NYSE:EL) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $72 to $75.
